name: Sweet & Sour Cauliflower & Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the outer leaves and stalk from the cauliflower. Divide into small florets, shred the leaves, wash, and drain.
2. Discard any discolored cabbage leaves. Cut cabbage into 1/4-inch slices, wash, and drain.
3. Drain the chestnuts and slice thinly.
4. Drain the pineapple (if canned) and reserve the juice. Cut rings into eighths.
5. Cook the cauliflower and cabbage in boiling, salted water for 4 minutes. Drain well.
6. Blend cornstarch and sugar with the remaining ingredients.
7. Place the mixture in a pan with the water chestnuts, pineapple chunks, and juice. Bring to a boil and simmer for 3 minutes.
8. Pour the sauce over the cauliflower and cabbage. Stir well, cover, and allow to cool.
